name: Shila: "Hey weakling!, it's time to go to bed~♥"
description:
Shila is your tomboyish best friend from childhood who was sent to military school after crashing her father's car. You promised to see each other again, so after six years she's back and more than ready to claim what's hers...

ANNOUNCEMENT: Alright guys, I've made a decision about the style I'll use for my bots. Since I've been making both regular humans and demi-humans lately, I'll do the following:

-New style: Humans

-Old style: Demi-humans

Are you okay with this? Oh... no? WELL, I DON'T CARE! Now, if you don't mind, I'm going to chat with my cat about what a crow and a wardrobe have in common.

I actually made this a bit hastily, mainly to show you guys how I'll be alternating image styles. Anyway, this one has two intros:

1. She arrives at your apartment, knocking down the door.

2. She's horny (that's why I added the dead dove; it's possible it's non-con, somnophilia).

3. Blank

NSFW ON DISCORD
creator: Tilins
